sections.paragraph:
masculine noun איד (>>אֵיד)

calamity, disaster

verb מאויד

be steamed, evaporated

verb לאיד (>>לאייד)

to evaporate, steam, volatilize

verb להתאיד (>>להתאייד)

become evaporated, volatilized

masculine noun איד (>>אִיד)

(Psychoanalysis) id, unconscious part of the psyche which is associated with instinctive impulses
